isnull((select item.description from dbo.item_all item where item.item = invitm.item and item.site_ref=invitm.site_ref), isnull((select coitem.description from dbo.coitem_all coitem where coitem.co_num = invitm.co_num
   and coitem.co_line = invitm.co_line
   and coitem.co_release = invitm.co_release
   and coitem.site_ref=invitm.site_ref),
   (select citemh.description from dbo.citemh_all citemh where citemh.co_num = invitm.co_num
   and citemh.co_line = invitm.co_line
   and citemh.co_release = invitm.co_release 
   and citemh.site_ref=invitm.site_ref)))

Case When InvhdrBillType = 'P'  then 
ROUND(Price , ISNULL(CurrPlaces,DerCurrencyPlaces) )  else
ROUND( (QtyInvoiced * Price) , ISNULL(CurrPlaces,DerCurrencyPlaces) )
End
